evals.name: happy-path-risk-assessment
evals.prompt: Assess risks for our e-commerce platform migration project. We're moving from monolith to microservices over 6 months.
evals.expected_output: Complete risk assessment with risk appetite framework, per-phase scanning, assumption stress-testing, risk register, pre-mortem, financial controls, and proposal hardening recommendations
expectations: Produces a risk appetite and tolerance framework table
Generates a risk register with probability, impact, exposure, mitigations, and owners
Includes assumption inventory with confidence levels and validation plans
Executes at least one pre-mortem scenario
Includes Mermaid diagrams for risk visualization

evals.name: edge-case-all-risks-low
evals.prompt: Run a risk analysis on our internal documentation portal upgrade. The team has done this exact migration three times before, budget is confirmed, timeline is flexible, and all stakeholders are aligned.
evals.expected_output: Risk assessment that flags suspiciously low risk profile and re-examines assumptions for optimism bias
expectations: Flags that all-low risk assessment is suspicious
Re-examines assumptions for optimism bias
Still produces a risk register even if risks appear minimal
Documents the meta-risk of complacency

evals.name: edge-case-late-showstopper
evals.prompt: We just discovered in Phase 4 that the third-party API we depend on is being deprecated in 3 months. What do we do?
evals.expected_output: Immediate escalation analysis with pre-mortem on impact and recommendation to re-run feasibility
expectations: Triggers immediate escalation protocol
Runs pre-mortem on the impact of the showstopper
Recommends re-running Phase 3b feasibility if needed
Updates risk register with the new critical risk

evals.name: edge-case-magnitude-drift
evals.prompt: Our Phase 3 estimate was 8 FTE-months but Phase 4 costing came back at 14 FTE-months. Is this normal?
evals.expected_output: Financial control alert identifying magnitude drift exceeding acceptable variance with remediation steps
expectations: Identifies magnitude drift of ~75% which exceeds the 40% threshold
Triggers re-estimation recommendation
Flags governance violation if not addressed
Provides specific remediation actions

evals.name: false-positive-operational-risk
evals.prompt: Our production system had three incidents last month. Can you analyze what went wrong and recommend fixes?
evals.expected_output: Polite decline explaining this is post-delivery operational risk outside the skill scope
expectations: Does NOT produce a full risk-controlling-dynamics analysis
Clarifies that post-delivery operational risk is outside scope
May suggest appropriate operational incident review processes
Does not generate a discovery-phase risk register for production incidents
